name: Data Flow Integrity
description: Every consumed artifact must have exactly one valid producer earlier in the trace.
formula: G(∀input ∈ inputs(a) → ∃!b . b < a ∧ input ∈ outputs(b))
rationale: Ensures the artifact dependency graph is well-formed. Broken data flow means an action used data that was never produced.

examples.fails: Action #5 consumes 'analysis_result' but no prior action produced it
